data.content: Implementation artifact ready. Branch: codex/4f8e-version-source. Commit: a8ce5d74c65b26e29a2d74b565634a2555926f51. Summary: removed the badge's NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_VERSION source, added a shared /api/version client status fetcher, made the header hook own canonical installed/latest/update status, passed installedVersion into VersionBadge, and wired forced badge checks back into shared status. Validation passed in the implementation worktree: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build.
